findings.description: `@OnError` annotation is used in the DB registration code example in s1 but is absent from the hints list. This annotation is Nablarch-specific and users may ask about error handling with `@OnError` in file upload actions.
findings.source_evidence: @OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "forward://RW11AC0601") in the doRW11AC0602 code example
